title: BBS AAAddon
description: AAA particle compatibility for use as forms in BBS CML EDITION
body:
# ✨ BBS AAAddon

The **BBS AAAddon** unlocks the ability to use **AAA particles** as forms within BBS. This is an incredibly powerful tool for animators looking to add high-quality special effects directly into their scenes!

### 🛠️ How to Use
Setting up your custom particles is a straightforward process:

1. Place your **`.efkefc`** particle files into your assets folder. Specifically, use this exact path:
   `config\bbs\assets\effeks\`
2. **Important:** Make sure to also place the textures for your particles in that exact same folder alongside your particle files!
3. Open the BBS Forms Menu in-game and look for the form labeled with the letters **"AAA"**.
4. Select it, open the particle selection panel to choose your specific effect, and you are ready to animate!

---

### ⚙️ Compatibility
This addon is fully supported and available for both Minecraft versions **1.20.1** and **1.21.1**.

---

### 👥 Credits
